allow: Bash(git commit -q -m 'feat: domain models and auth with JWT plus socket handshake verification *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'feat: realtime core with receipts, presence, typing, and reconnect sync *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'feat: redis adapter, sliding-window rate limits, and multi-instance tests *)

Bash(NODE_ENV=production PORT=4000 MONGO_URI=mongodb://127.0.0.1:27017/parley-load REDIS_URL=redis://127.0.0.1:6379 JWT_ACCESS_SECRET=$\(openssl rand -hex 32\) JWT_REFRESH_SECRET=$\(openssl rand -hex 32\) CORS_ORIGIN=http://localhost:5173 LOG_LEVEL=warn CONN_RATE_LIMIT=1000000 node dist/index.js)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'feat: k6 load test with measured results, tunable auth rate limit *)
Bash(sed -i '' 's/for \(let i = 0; i < 4; i += 1\)/for \(let i = 0; i < 14; i += 1\)/' typing-test.mjs)

Bash(sed -i '' 's/bg-accent px-3 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white transition-colors hover:bg-accent-hover/bg-accent-strong px-3 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white transition-colors hover:bg-accent-strong-hover/' screens/AuthScreen.tsx)

Bash(sed -i '' 's/bg-accent px-1.5 py-0.5 text-\\[11px\\] font-semibold leading-none text-white/bg-accent-strong px-1.5 py-0.5 text-[11px] font-semibold leading-none text-white/' components/Sidebar.tsx)

Bash(sed -i '' 's/bg-accent px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-semibold text-white shadow-sm transition-colors hover:bg-accent-hover/bg-accent-strong px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-semibold text-white shadow-sm transition-colors hover:bg-accent-strong-hover/' components/MessageList.tsx)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'feat: full chat frontend with design system, a11y 100, verified live *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'chore: update local tool permission allowlist *)
Bash(pnpm --filter @parley/server add @anthropic-ai/sdk openai @qdrant/js-client-rest bullmq multer pdf-parse)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'feat: AI foundation with provider abstraction and hermetic mock *)
